problem id: ab064b6a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(6) AND NOT SHR(7)) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10100100 -> 11110111
  10010101 -> 00110011
  10000101 -> 10110111
  01010111 -> 10010010
  01010110 -> 11011010
  01011110 -> 10011000
  10011110 -> 10101001
  11111011 -> 11011001

query: 00000000
predicted answer: 11111111
